prompt.content:
Make the following changes to the merger model
1.	For the RAMBUS vs SLAB analysis, update the %SG&A Synergies to 85%
2.	Update the SLAB acquisition share price to its average daily share price between Oct 1 and Dec 31 2025 (inclusive of start and end dates)
3. Update the Advisory fees and financing fees to 0.2% and 1.0% respectively
4.	Create a 5 year Pro Forma Income statement forecast with the following assumptions.
 a.	Treat the current pro forma income statement as Year 1.
 b.	For Year 2, grow revenue by the weighted average growth rate of RMBS's and SLAB's revenue between 2024 and the annualized revenue using the 9 months 2025 data. Use the annualized 9M 2025 revenue as the weights.
 c.	   Starting in Year 3, reduce the growth rate by 2 percentage points each year.
 d.   Calculate Cost of revenue for Year 2 using pro forma proportion of revenue + 0.5pp. For each following year, decrease the ratio by 0.5pp annually to calculate.
 e.   For each of SG&A and Other Operating Expense, Year 2 revenue ratio is pro forma + 1pp. Then decrease the ratio 1pp annually for each following year.
 f.	   After Year 1, set Advisory & Financing Fees to zero.
 g.	Keep the Net Interest Income, Provision for Income Taxes and weighted average shares outstanding fixed at the Year 1 level through out the forecast period.
Calculate the EPS accretion/(dilution) in year 2, 3, 4 and 5. Present answer in % to 2 decimal places

rubrics.name: States Year 2 EPS Accretion is -23.18% (acceptable range -23.41% to -22.95%) (ver_70fc264964a946eb935baf104d528748)
